content.cn_text: 两名商科学生 Janet 和 Michael 正在讨论他们关于洗发水营销的研究。
content.en_text: Business students called Janet and Michael, discussing their research into the marketing

content.cn_text: 研究对象是不同种类洗发水的营销。
content.en_text: of different kinds of shampoo.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第21至第26题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions 21 to 26.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第21至第26题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 21 to 26.

content.cn_text: Michael：嗨 Janet，洗发水营销项目进展怎么样？
content.en_text: Michael: Hi Janet, how are you getting on with the shampoo marketing project?

content.cn_text: Janet：嗨 Michael，很有意思。
content.en_text: Janet: Hi Michael, it's interesting.

content.cn_text: 我读了一些关于过去一百年里洗发水营销如何发展的内容。
content.en_text: I've read how shampoo marketing has developed over the last hundred years.

content.cn_text: Michael：哦，我以为我们不需要做这个。
content.en_text: Michael: Oh, I didn't think we needed to do that.

content.cn_text: Janet：是的，不过我自己感兴趣。
content.en_text: Janet: True, but I'm interested anyway.

content.cn_text: 基本上，过去洗发水被当作一种经济实惠的清洁头发方式来销售，现在已经发展成
content.en_text: Basically, what was once sold as an economical way of getting your hair clean has evolved

content.cn_text: 一种美容产品。
content.en_text: into a beauty product.

content.cn_text: 洗发水很有意思，因为它会显著影响我们如何看待自己。
content.en_text: And shampoo is interesting because it's a key influence in how we see ourselves.

content.cn_text: 你听说过 bad hair days 吧。
content.en_text: You've heard of bad hair days.

content.cn_text: Michael: 就是头发看起来糟糕，也许没洗头，然后你会因此感觉不好。
content.en_text: Michael: When your hair looks bad, maybe you didn't wash it and you feel bad about it.

content.cn_text: 你听说过吗？
content.en_text: You heard of them?

content.cn_text: 听说过。
content.en_text: Yes.

content.cn_text: 经历过吗？
content.en_text: Had one?

content.cn_text: 没有。
content.en_text: No.

content.cn_text: 我觉得它们不是真的。
content.en_text: Don't think they're real.

content.cn_text: bad hair days 不是真的？
content.en_text: Bad hair days?

content.cn_text: 别这样。
content.en_text: Come on.

content.cn_text: Janet: 不管你怎么称呼它们，耶鲁大学的研究可不是这么说的。
content.en_text: Janet: Well, whatever you want to call them, that's not what research from Yale is suggesting.

content.cn_text: 它们并不只是想象出来的，而且男性和女性受影响程度相同。
content.en_text: They're not just imagined and both sexes are equally affected by them.

content.cn_text: 而且当这种情况发生时，人们往往表现更差，感觉也比平时更糟。
content.en_text: And when they happen, people tend to perform and feel worse than usual.

content.cn_text: Michael：明白。
content.en_text: Michael: Right.

content.cn_text: 我一直在读洗发水成分，比如 sodium laurel sulfate 这类化学物质，
content.en_text: And I've been reading about shampoo ingredients, chemicals like sodium laurel sulfate,

content.cn_text: Janet: 还有 methyl chloride。
content.en_text: Janet: methyl chloride.

content.cn_text: 许多制造商会使用这些或类似化学物质，不过他们对此保持低调。
content.en_text: Many of the manufacturers tend to use these or others like them, though they keep it quiet.

content.cn_text: Michael: 对。
content.en_text: Michael: Right.

content.cn_text: 在产品包装上，他们对这件事出奇地沉默。
content.en_text: When it comes to the product packaging, they're strangely silent about it.

content.cn_text: Janet: 另一个值得研究的领域是瓶身标签。
content.en_text: Janet: Another area it would be interesting to investigate is the labeling on bottles.

content.cn_text: 显然，直接在瓶身上印刷比贴印刷标签便宜大约50%。
content.en_text: Apparently, printing directly onto the bottles costs about 50% less than sticking a printed

content.cn_text: 因为这个过程快得多。
content.en_text: label on because it's a much quicker process.

content.cn_text: 但制造商对此并不热情，因为它不能增强瓶子的视觉冲击力。
content.en_text: But manufacturers are lukewarm about this because it doesn't enhance the visual impact
of the bottle.

content.cn_text: 它看起来有点廉价。
content.en_text: It comes across as a bit cheap.

content.cn_text: Michael：我们需要考虑环保问题。
content.en_text: Michael: We need to think about environmental issues.

content.cn_text: 我很惊讶瓶子里使用的再生塑料这么少。
content.en_text: I was surprised how little recycled plastic goes into the bottles.

content.cn_text: Janet：我想这是因为浅色塑料更难用再生材料制作。
content.en_text: Janet: I think it's because light colored plastic is more difficult to make from recycled stuff.

content.cn_text: Michael：是的，不过制造商只要把包装做得
content.en_text: Michael: Yeah, but manufacturers can make their packaging more environmentally friendly just by making

content.cn_text: 更轻，就能让包装更环保。
content.en_text: it less heavy.

content.cn_text: 我想在研究中看看他们是否真的这么做。
content.en_text: I'd like to find out whether some of them actually do when we do the research.

content.cn_text: Janet：是的，这值得调查。
content.en_text: Janet: Yes, that's worth looking into.

content.cn_text: 从你作为消费者的角度看，选择洗发水时什么重要？
content.en_text: Thinking about you as a customer, what's important when choosing shampoo?

content.cn_text: Michael：我总是对特价促销很谨慎。
content.en_text: Michael: I'm always wary of special offers.

content.cn_text: 当某样东西标着半价时，实际上很少真的那么划算。
content.en_text: When something's flagged as being half price, it rarely is, really.

content.cn_text: 但如果有一个我从没见过的牌子，我通常愿意试一试，而不是
content.en_text: But if there's a make I've never seen before, I'm usually up for giving it a go rather

content.cn_text: 一辈子只坚持一两个喜欢的品牌。
content.en_text: than sticking to one or two favorite brands all my life.

content.cn_text: Janet：有意思。
content.en_text: Janet: Interesting.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余讨论之前，你有一些时间浏览第27题
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the discussion, you have some time to look at questions 27

content.cn_text: 到第30题。
content.en_text: to 30.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第27至第30题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 27 to 30.

content.cn_text: Janet：那我们讨论一下这些洗发水广告，试着识别每个广告想从观众那里引发什么样的心理
content.en_text: Janet: Shall we discuss some of these shampoo advertisements then and try and identify what sort of psychological

content.cn_text: 反应，好吗？
content.en_text: response each one is trying to get from the viewer?

content.cn_text: Michael：好的。
content.en_text: Michael: Okay.

content.cn_text: Zing 怎么样？
content.en_text: What about Zing?

content.cn_text: Janet: 嗯，它可能同样吸引男性和女性。
content.en_text: Janet: Well, it would probably appeal equally to men and women.

content.cn_text: 广告里我们看到一个幸福家庭、漂亮的家、健康又好看的孩子，他们有干净的
content.en_text: In the ad we see this happy family, lovely home, healthy, good looking children with clean

content.cn_text: 头发。
content.en_text: hair.

content.cn_text: 显然，是的。
content.en_text: Obviously, yes.

content.cn_text: 我觉得我们看广告时应该会想，哇，要是我的生活也那样就好了。
content.en_text: And I think we're supposed to watch the ad and think, wow, if only my life was like that.

content.cn_text: Michael：对，我明白你的意思。
content.en_text: Michael: Yeah, I know what you mean.

content.cn_text: 我觉得广告商想让观众几乎希望自己就是广告里的人。
content.en_text: I think the advertisers want the viewers to almost wish they were the people in the ad.

content.cn_text: Janet：没错。
content.en_text: Janet: Sure.

content.cn_text: 我的意思是，这在广告中很常见。
content.en_text: I mean, that's very common in advertising.

content.cn_text: Michael: 但并不是所有广告都这样。
content.en_text: Michael: But not universal.

content.cn_text: 你知道 Splash 洗发水那个大约五分钟长、带故事情节的广告吗？
content.en_text: You know that ad for Splash shampoo that lasts about five minutes and where there's a story?

content.cn_text: Janet: 哦，知道，就是那个关于一对情侣的广告，整个广告过程中
content.en_text: Janet: Oh, yes, the commercial about the couple and all through the commercial.

content.cn_text: 都不清楚他们会分手还是继续在一起。
content.en_text: It's not clear if they're going to break up or stay together.

content.cn_text: Michael: 正是。
content.en_text: Michael: Exactly.

content.cn_text: 我觉得那里的营销做得很聪明。
content.en_text: Well, I think the marketing has been done very cleverly there.

content.cn_text: 我不认为我们应该想成为广告中的角色，但我们
content.en_text: I don't think we're supposed to want to be the characters in the commercial, but we're

content.cn_text: 会逐渐了解他们。
content.en_text: supposed to get to know them a bit.

content.cn_text: Janet: 是的。
content.en_text: Janet: Yes.

content.cn_text: 我觉得这个故事很有效。
content.en_text: Well, I thought the story was effective.

content.cn_text: 广告结束时，你会很高兴知道他们显然会继续在一起。
content.en_text: You're glad to learn when it's over that they're obviously going to stay together.

content.cn_text: 但我觉得洗发水在故事中的作用至少可以说有点薄弱。
content.en_text: But I think the role of the shampoo and the story was a bit thin to say the least.

content.cn_text: Michael: 嗯。
content.en_text: Michael: Hmm.

content.cn_text: 也许吧。
content.en_text: Maybe.

content.cn_text: 我想有些制造商不想用所有科学信息让人感到无聊。
content.en_text: I suppose some manufacturers don't want to bore people with all the science.

content.cn_text: Janet：当然。
content.en_text: Janet: Sure.

content.cn_text: Michael: 然后还有 Just-go 的广告。
content.en_text: Michael: And then there's the Just-go advertisement.

content.cn_text: Janet：是的。
content.en_text: Janet: Yes.

content.cn_text: 它包含很多关于洗发水实际成分的技术信息。
content.en_text: That had lots of technical information about what the shampoo actually consists of.

content.cn_text: 我想他们希望顾客在购买 Just-go 时感到有信心，至少觉得自己
content.en_text: I suppose they want customers to feel confident that when they buy Just-go, they're at least

content.cn_text: 是在做一个有依据的决定。
content.en_text: making an informed decision.

content.cn_text: Michael: 是的。
content.en_text: Michael: Yes.

content.cn_text: 他们买的是一种能达到他们想要效果的产品。
content.en_text: They're buying something that will do the job they want it to.

content.cn_text: Janet：就是这样。
content.en_text: Janet: That's it.

content.cn_text: Michael: 我读到过，最近最有效的洗发水广告之一是 Brozene 的广告。
content.en_text: Michael: I've read one of the most effective shampoo ads in recent times was the one for Brozene.

content.cn_text: Janet：是的，但它没有解说，只有洗发水的画面和很多干净头发的画面。
content.en_text: Janet: Yes, but there's no commentary, just images of the shampoo and lots of clean hair.

content.cn_text: 不过我想它的效果非常镇静放松，有轻柔的音乐和非常平和的画面。
content.en_text: I suppose the effect, though, is very calming with soft music and very peaceful imagery.

content.cn_text: Michael：是的，但广告结束时，我们几乎没有了解它的任何信息。
content.en_text: Michael: Yes, but at the end of the ad, we've hardly learned anything about it.

content.cn_text: 关于这个产品，对吧？
content.en_text: About the product, have we?

content.cn_text: Janet：我想是的。
content.en_text: Janet: I suppose not.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B, or C.
groups.title: Questions 21–26.

items.title: Janet says that over time, shampoo has become
items.analysis: 答案解析：第21题问 Janet 说洗发水随着时间变成了什么。原文说它从清洁头发的经济产品 evolved into a beauty product，说明商品类型变了，所以答案是 C. a different kind of commodity。

items.title: What does Janet say about ‘bad hair days’?

options.title: B
options.content: Women worry about them more than men.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第22题问 Janet 对 bad hair days 的看法。原文说 they're not just imagined，说明它们确实存在，所以答案是 A. They really do exist。both sexes equally affected 排除 B。

items.title: What do Janet and Michael say about the chemicals used in shampoos?

options.title: A
options.content: All shampoos contain the same chemicals.

options.title: B
options.content: The chemicals are believed to be dangerous.

options.title: C
options.content: The presence of the chemicals is rarely publicised.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第23题问他们对洗发水中的化学物质说了什么。原文说 manufacturers keep it quiet、silent about it，说明这些化学物质的存在很少被公开宣传，所以答案是 C. The presence of the chemicals is rarely publicised。

items.title: According to Janet, printing directly onto shampoo bottles, rather than onto labels,
items.analysis: 答案解析：第24题问 Janet 说直接印在瓶身上而不是标签上会怎样。原文说这种方式成本更低、过程更快，但看起来 cheap、视觉效果差，所以答案是 B. looks less attractive。

items.title: With regard to environmental issues, Michael and Janet want to investigate

options.title: B
options.content: variations in the weight of shampoo bottles.

options.title: C
options.content: the source of recycled plastic in shampoo bottles.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第25题问关于环保问题，两人想调查什么。原文说想了解制造商是否通过 making it less heavy 来改进包装，所以答案是 B. variations in the weight of shampoo bottles。

items.title: Michael bases his own shampoo purchase decisions on his

options.title: B
options.content: desire to get value for money.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第26题问 Michael 根据什么做购买决定。原文说他愿意尝试没见过的新品牌，而不是坚持固定品牌，所以答案是 C. willingness to try new products。special offers 是他警惕的内容，不是购买依据。

groups.desc: According to the speakers, what is the main advertising focus of each of the following shampoo advertisements? Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–G next to questions 27–30.
groups.title: Questions 27–30.

items.title: Zing
items.analysis: 答案解析：第27题问 Zing 的广告重点。原文描述幸福家庭、漂亮住宅，并让观众希望自己的生活也那样，这是令人羡慕的生活方式，所以答案是 B. enviable lifestyle。

items.title: Splash
items.analysis: 答案解析：第28题问 Splash 的广告重点。原文围绕一对情侣、分手还是在一起、故事有效展开，所以答案是 F. romantic interest。

items.title: Just go
items.analysis: 答案解析：第29题问 Just go 的广告重点。原文说广告提供技术信息，让顾客相信产品会达到预期效果，强调产品可靠性，所以答案是 E. product reliability。

items.title: Brozene
items.analysis: 答案解析：第30题问 Brozene 的广告重点。原文说 calming、soft music、peaceful imagery，明显对应放松感，所以答案是 A. link to relaxation。
